She takes her role as their caretaker seriously, along with most other things. name: Murasaki Shikibu
description: A writer and poet in the Heian Period. The exact circumstances of her life are unknown. She has written works such as “The Tale of Genji”, “Lady Murasaki Collection” and “The Diary of Lady Murasaki”. Her poems are also selected for the “Later Collection of Gleanings of Japanese Poems” as well as subsequent poem anthologies. name: Saya
description: She hunts chiropterans using a katana. It is implied that she is the last remaining vampire and is called "the only remaining original." Saya has no weakness to sunlight but it is unknown if she has any of the other vulnerabilities of normal vampires. However, she becomes distressed when she encounters religious people and angry when people mention God in her presence.
